subcodes.first_line: O steadfast in the Covenant! For some time I have not written aught unto thee, yet were a hundred scribes to be at hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد چندیست که چیزی بشما ننگاشتم ولی اگر صد کاتب موجود گردد از عهده
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @attaining the life of the spirit
